zh.lifeSummary: 當Isaac Komnenos於1113年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾時，他的父親Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár26歲，母親Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary25歲。他於1134年與Theodora Kamateros在塞浦路斯尼科西亞塞浦路斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1122年被列為sebastokrator of cyprus。他去世於1160年享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isaac Komnenos于1113年出生在白展丁 艾皮爾时，他的父亲Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár26岁，母亲Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary25岁。他于1134年与Theodora Kamateros在塞浦路斯尼科西亞塞浦路斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1122年被列为sebastokrator of cyprus。他去世于1160年享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: Isaac
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the son of Abraham, who was nearly sacrificed by his father according to a command of God which was changed at the last moment. A ram, caught in a nearby thicket, was sacrificed instead (Genesis 22:1–13). Isaac lived on to marry Rebecca and become the father of Esau and Jacob. The derivation of the name is not certain; it has traditionally been connected with the Hebrew verb meaning ‘to laugh’. It was borne by both Christians and Jews in the Middle Ages and was taken up by the Puritans in the 16th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Isaac Komnenos was born in 1113, in Byzantine Empire, his father, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, was 26 and his mother, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, was 25. He married Theodora Kamateros in 1134, in Cyprus, Nicosia, Cyprus. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. In 1122, at the age of 9, his occupation is listed as sebastokrator of cyprus. He died in 1160, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isaac Komnenos est né en 1113, à Empire byzantin, son père, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Theodora Kamateros en 1134, à Cyprus, Nicosia, Chypre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. En 1122, à l’âge de 9 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sebastokrator of cyprus. Il est décédé en 1160, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isaac Komnenos 1113 in Byzantinisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár 26 und seine Mutter Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary 25. Er hat 1134 in Cyprus, Nicosia, Zypern Theodora Kamateros geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1122, als er 9 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sebastokrator of cyprus aufgeführt. Er starb 1160 im Alter von 47 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Komnenos è nato il nel 1113 nel Impero bizantino, il suo padre, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Theodora Kamateros nel 1134, nel Cyprus, Nicosia, Cipro. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1122, all'età di 9 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sebastokrator of cyprus. Morì nel 1160, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isaac Komnenosが1113年に東ローマ帝国で生まれた時，父Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császárは26歳，母Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungaryは25歳であった。1134年にキプロスニコシアシプルスでTheodora Kamaterosと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1122年，9歳の時，職業はsebastokrator of cyprusと記録されている。彼は1160年に47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isaac Komnenos(이)가 1113년 비자틴 피르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1134년 키프로스 니코샤 시프루스에서 Theodora Kamateros(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1122년, 9세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sebastokrator of cyprus이었다. 그는 1160년 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isaac Komnenos nasceu em 1113, em Império Bizantino, seu pai, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Theodora Kamateros em 1134, em Cyprus, Nicosia, Chipre. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1122, com 9 anos, sua profissão aparece como sebastokrator of cyprus. Ele faleceu em 1160, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isaac Komnenos родился в 1113 г. в местности Византийская империя, его отцу по имени Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Theodora Kamateros в 1134 г. в местности сипрус, никося, Кипр. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. В 1122 году, в возрасте 9 лет,  он работал по профессии sebastokrator of cyprus. Он умер в 1160 г. в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isaac Komnenos nació en 1113, en Imperio bizantino, su papá, Komnēnos-házi II.Iōannēs Bizánci császár, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Saint Irene Komnenos of Hungary, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Theodora Kamateros en 1134, en Cyprus, Nicosia, Chipre. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1122, a la edad de 9 años, su ocupación registrada era sebastokrator of cyprus. Murió en 1160, a la edad de 47 años.
